meta.title: Resume | Maxime Brochot
meta.description: Resume of Maxime Brochot, Web and Mobile Web Developer with an engineering background.

profile.paragraph1: Web & Mobile Web Developer with an engineering background, combining analytical thinking, structured problem-solving and a strong focus on building clear, maintainable and user-focused applications.
profile.paragraph2: Passionate about software architecture, continuous improvement and clean development practices, I enjoy turning ideas into reliable solutions through thoughtful design and modern web technologies.

portfolio.description: Designed and developed a personal portfolio focused on reusable components, maintainable architecture, accessibility, SEO and professional development practices.

trouveTonArtisan.description: Built a full-stack web application allowing users to search local artisans by category or name through a React frontend, a REST API and a relational database.

portDePlaisanceRussel.description: Developed a RESTful API with authentication, CRUD operations, reservation management and interactive API documentation.

tifosi.description: Designed and implemented a normalized relational database with SQL scripts, integrity constraints and advanced queries.

tasks.planning: Coordinated production planning and daily operations in an industrial environment.
tasks.management: Led multidisciplinary teams while ensuring quality, productivity and delivery objectives.
tasks.improvement: Contributed to continuous improvement initiatives and operational decision-making.

tasks.management: Supported production management and coordinated operators and technicians.
tasks.optimization: Participated in process optimization and industrial improvement projects.
tasks.erp: Contributed to ERP implementation and production data management.

tasks.improvement: Worked on continuous improvement initiatives within aircraft maintenance operations.
tasks.analysis: Analysed production workflows and proposed process optimizations.
tasks.projectManagement: Participated in project management activities with multidisciplinary teams.

webDevelopment.title: Web & Mobile Web Developer
webDevelopment.description: Professional training focused on full-stack web development, covering frontend and backend technologies, databases, software architecture and modern development practices.

engineering.title: Engineering Degree - High Performance Materials
engineering.description: Engineering degree providing a strong foundation in analytical thinking, problem-solving, project management and continuous improvement.
